texto: Well, it’s too late. I’m already attached. And you won’t know if it will last unless you really, really try, right?”“What is that supposed to mean?”“Well, Charlie said I could live with them. And you too. She really likes you. She said she’s never had a mother, and she asked me if I would mind sharing mine. I told her I wouldn’t if she didn’t mind sharing her father.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lacey Silks que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Well, it’s too late. I’m already attached. And you won’t know if it will last unless you really, …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, aww, child, com foco em child e step-parents.
